description_long: This object is a rectangular, flat representation of a residential neighborhood, featuring a dense cluster of small, individual houses with red and blue rooftops. The surface is covered with a high-resolution aerial texture, showing streets, green patches, and a mix of developed and undeveloped land. The houses are closely packed, separated by narrow roads and pathways, with some areas showing more greenery and open spaces. The coloration suggests a mix of urban and semi-urban development, with clear demarcations between built-up and natural areas. The object is extremely thin, resembling a map or a satellite image laid flat. No three-dimensional architectural details such as walls, roofs, or windows are visible in relief; all features are depicted in the surface texture.
description: A flat, rectangular surface displaying a detailed aerial view of a residential neighborhood with clustered houses, roads, and green spaces. The object resembles a thin map or satellite image with no raised architectural features.
description_view_0: From this view, the object appears as a thin, wide rectangle with the aerial neighborhood texture clearly visible, showing a mix of houses and open land.
description_view_1: This view shows the object from a narrow end, emphasizing its extreme thinness and the continuation of the neighborhood pattern along its length.
description_view_2: Seen from the opposite long side, the rectangular shape and the dense arrangement of houses and roads are again prominent, with more green areas visible.
description_view_3: From this end, the object’s thin profile is highlighted, and the aerial texture continues, showing the transition from built-up to undeveloped land.
